channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Parked in an Watson Close, 24th April
item.description:
The driver has parked his vehicle for days on end and dont leave in Watson Close. He said the council soldor permitted him to park here. We dont even have enough parki g for every flat. So we need the Car towed and the Gate key taking from him.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watson Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple grafiti tags, left and right of door to 104 Anerley Road, 24th April
item.description:
Multiple graffiti tags, left and right of door to 104 Anerley Road. Of blue, green, and white pen or spray on blue painted surfaces. Tags depict ZOLA, CKEK, and CLOK

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, lLeft of door to 104 Anerley Road, 24th April
item.description:
One golden A spray painted on grey painted surface of residential property - Left of door to 104 Anerley Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded grafiti on gable end of 96 Anerley Road, 24th April
item.description:
Graffiti of various colours on a white painted wall here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Door fly tipped outside 30-40 Underwood Street, 24th April
item.description:
An internal door has been dumped outside unit 2, 30-40 Underwood Street for almost a week now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Underwood Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground, 24th April
item.description:
Last summer the council spend a ton of money on the water toys and don’t fix the playground. Almost every toy is damaged or Brocken!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gaffiti on residential gate post, 24th April
item.description:
Yellow spray paint (depicting ZOLA) on black galvanised metal gate post.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Waldegrave Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 24th April
item.description:
Graffiti tagging on street furniture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Street Promenade of Light, Finsbury, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping behind cycle hanger, 24th April
item.description:
Fly tippinb behind cycle hanger

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlisle Walk, Hackney, London

item.title: Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road, 24th April
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several rubbish bags and wood flytipped, 24th April
item.description:
Several blue rubbish bags and pieces of wood have been dumped by the stairs leading from Mottingham Lane to Carters Hill Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Devan bed dumped on pavement, 24th April
item.description:
Devan bed dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Lant Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and plants etc on street, 24th April
item.description:
Please could the street be cleansed? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leafage around and in drain, 24th April
item.description:
Please could this be cleaned? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A black Mercedes reg V26 ELJ dumped rubbish and drove off, 24th April
item.description:
A black Mercedes people carrier just dumped rubbish out onto the road/verge on The Avenue close to the entrance of Redroofs Close BR3 5YR The Mercedes reg no. Was V26 ELJ The driver a white male saw me walking up the road and jumped back in the vehicle and drove off before I reached him he shook the rubbish out at approx 15:25 Friday 24th April 2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress & bed on the road, 24th April
item.description:
Passenger not able to walk through the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Terrace, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heron Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vomit by foot tunnel, 24th April
item.description:
Vomit has been here since Thursday 16 April. It’s now dried up but needs a proper clean. I have tried to clear with paper towels and disinfectant. Please can you give this a thorough clean with water and necessary equipment. I didn’t have these resources. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cutty Sark Gardens, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several abandoned bikes, 24th April
item.description:
This parking has all but one abandoned, rusty, broken bikes. It could be of better use as a covered bike hub

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glading Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of blossom left by street cleaners, 24th April
item.description:
Bag of blossom swept up and left by street cleaners since this week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Drive, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet
